subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Your detailed letter was perused, but due to lack of time, a brief reply is being written [3.5s]... ...O Thou peerless and loving Lord! Though capacity and worthiness are lacking, and it is infinitely hard to withstand tribulations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی نامه مفصل شما ملاحظه گردید ولی از عدم فرصت مختصر جواب مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transcending the material condition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @development of capacity and readiness
